data.name: Every BR
data.requires: (|BR1| AND |BR2| AND |BR3| AND |BR4| AND |BR5| AND |BR6| AND |BR7| AND |BR8| AND |BR9| AND |BR10| AND |BR11| AND |BR12| AND |BR13| AND |BR14|) OR |Progressive BR:14|

data.name: Any BR
data.requires: (|BR1| OR |BR2| OR |BR3| OR |BR4| OR |BR5| OR |BR6| OR |BR7| OR |BR8| OR |BR9| OR |BR10| OR |BR11| OR |BR12| OR |BR13| OR |BR14|) OR |Progressive BR:1|

data.name: Has Plane
data.requires: (|Aviation| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND (|Fighter| OR |Bomber| OR |Strike Aircraft|))

data.name: Has Helicopter
data.requires: (|Ground Vehicles| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND (|Attack Helicopter| OR |Utility Helicopter|))

data.name: Has Tank
data.requires: (|Ground Vehicles| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND (|Light Tank| OR |Medium Tank| OR |Heavy Tank| OR |Tank Destroyer| OR |SPAA|))

data.name: Has Blue Fleet
data.requires: (|Bluewater Fleet| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND (|Light Cruiser| OR |Heavy Cruiser| OR |Battlecruiser| OR |Battleship| OR |Destroyer|))

data.name: Has Coast Fleet
data.requires: (|Coastal Fleet| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND (|Frigate| OR |Boat| OR |Heavy Boat| OR |Barge|))

data.name: Has Every Vehicle
data.requires: (|Has Plane| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_planes)}) AND (|Has Helicopter| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_helis)}) AND (|Has Tank| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_tanks)}) AND (|Has Blue Fleet| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_bluefleet)}) AND (|Has Coast Fleet| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_coastals)})

data.name: Has Every Nation
data.requires: (|USA| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_usa)}) AND (|Germany| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_germany)}) AND (|USSR| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_ussr)}) AND (|Great Britain| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_brits)}) AND (|Japan| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_japan)}) AND (|China| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_china)}) AND (|Italy| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_italy)}) AND (|France| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_france)}) AND (|Sweden| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_sweden)}) AND (|Israel| OR {YamlEnabled(exclude_israel)})

data.name: Need Attack Helicoper
data.requires: (|Ground Vehicles| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_heli_attack)} AND |Attack Helicopter|)

data.name: Need Utility Helicopter
data.requires: (|Ground Vehicles| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_heli_util)} AND |Utility Helicopter|)

data.name: Need Light Tank
data.requires: (|Ground Vehicles| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_tank_l)} AND |Light Tank|)

data.name: Need Medium Tank
data.requires: (|Ground Vehicles| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_tank_m)} AND |Medium Tank|)

data.name: Need Heavy Tank
data.requires: (|Ground Vehicles| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_tank_h)} AND |Heavy Tank|)

data.name: Need Tank Destroyer
data.requires: (|Ground Vehicles| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_tank_destroyer)} AND |Tank Destroyer|)

data.name: Need Light Cruiser
data.requires: (|Bluewater Fleet| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_cruiser_l)} AND |Light Cruiser|)

data.name: Need Heavy Cruiser
data.requires: (|Bluewater Fleet| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_cruiser_h)} AND |Heavy Cruiser|)

data.name: Need Heavy Boat
data.requires: (|Coastal Fleet| AND {YamlDisabled(complex_vehicles)}) OR ({YamlEnabled(complex_vehicles)} AND {YamlDisabled(exclude_boat_h)} AND |Heavy Boat|)
